art_highlights: Global art market grew to $59.6 billion in 2025, up 4%, signaling a turnaround.
U.S. auction sales rebounded by 23% in 2025 to $3.17 billion, the first annual increase since 2022.
Impressionist and Post-Impressionist art surged 47% in value; Old Masters grew 30%.
Art Basel Hong Kong (March 28, 2026) is the upcoming barometer for the Asian market.

market_trends.summary: Market recovery is ongoing but uneven; risk aversion persists in high-value segments.
key_points: Auction guarantees in New York reached a decade-high of 78% in 2025.
Short-term flipping proved unprofitable in 2025; long-term holding yields positive returns.
Confidence remains cautiously optimistic for 2026 despite geopolitical uncertainties.
U.S. continues to dominate with 44% of global sales share.
